category_sources: source_facts.description says Source-highlight is a source-code syntax highlighter; official GNU page describes converting source files to syntax-highlighted documents.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page and manual use the display name "GNU Source-highlight".
docs_sources: Official GNU Source-highlight manual is hosted on gnu.org/software/src-highlite/source-highlight.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU Source-highlight page says the Git repository can be browsed on Savannah at git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/src-highlite.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official GNU manual describe source-code highlighting, document generation, and command-line tools.
